hero.eyebrow: You are invited to our wedding

story.title: Celebrate With Us
story.text: Dear friends and family,It brings us great joy to share this special day with you. We warmly invite you to our wedding, which will take place in the town of Vinci — a place filled with love and emotion. Vinci is a small but remarkable town in Tuscany, known as the birthplace of Leonardo da Vinci.  Your presence is the greatest gift we could ask for. Let’s create unforgettable memories together ❤️

venue.title: Vinci — Tuscany
venue.intro: In the heart of Tuscany, surrounded by olive trees and vineyards, we will celebrate our day together.
